comment.body: Happy belated birthday Alma. Spent most of Sunday reading some of your older posts. Fascinating stuff, and brilliantly well written. One thing I don't agree with is the likelihood of China invading soon. The naval power gap between US/Japan and China is huge. I haven't done the digging myself, but the deepwater capabilities of China's fleet are still small. I assume you're referring to the use of jetski drones and how Ukraine used them so effectively against Russia's fleet? If so, you're correct as it will definitely change the calculus in a conflict. Still think US and Jap have the edge tho, as their navies are known to be the strongest. Also, food supplies of China can run out quite quickly as they import so much of what they need, what makes you think they'll be able to survive if all imports are blockaded?
comment.raw_body: Happy belated birthday Alma. Spent most of Sunday reading some of your older posts. Fascinating stuff, and brilliantly well written. One thing I don't agree with is the likelihood of China invading soon. The naval power gap between US/Japan and China is huge. Still think US and Jap have the edge tho, as their navies are known to be the strongest. Also, food supplies of China can run out quite quickly as they import so much of what they need, what makes you think they'll be able to survive if all imports are blockaded?

comment.body:
Pope passed away. 

He was 88 years old. He became Pope in 2013 and was the first in history to come from the New World — Francis was born in Argentina. In recent months, he had been suffering from pneumonia.

❗️According to a medieval prophecy about the popes, the current one is said to be the last before the apocalypse and the Second Coming of Christ. I am not looking forward to an apocalypse
